请输入源数据库名称: Please enter the name of the source database

选择业务域，便于后续管理: Select a business domain for easy subsequent management

精准明确的应用描述同样有助于后续管理: Accurate and clear application descriptions also contribute to subsequent management

配置流程参数，作为临时字段，可以存放某个字段值，或计算结果，或接收其他流程中传过: Configure process parameters as temporary fields that can store a certain field value, calculate results, or receive values passed from other processes;
请输入当前 Key Pair 的应用描述: Please enter the application description of the current Key Pair
动态输入参数，请使用上方【输入参数】，且以“{}”取值。举例：根据订单编号以及是: Dynamic input parameters, please use the 'Input Parameters' above and take the value' {} '. Example: Based on the order number and whether it contains a specific product, the order number takes {order_num} and the product name {order. itemname}. Up to 1000 rows of records can be queried.
还未进行连接测试: Connection testing has not yet been conducted
为便于管理，API名称在当前连接器内唯一，至多128个字符。: For ease of management, the API name is unique within the current connector, with a maximum of 128 characters.
请选择自定义认证函数: Please select a custom authentication function
请输入应用名称搜索: Please enter an application name to search for
删除节点后，所有相关节点配置都将被重置，需要重新配置这些节点。请确认要执行此操作: After deleting nodes, all related node configurations will be reset and these nodes need to be reconfigured. Please confirm to perform this operation
将应用进行归类，有助于后续管理。: Classifying applications helps with subsequent management.
无法为基础模块设置流程: Unable to set process for base module
请将以上IP加入到数据库服务器的访问白名单中: Please add the above IP addresses to the access whitelist of the database server
将向指定路径以选择的方法发起请求: Request will be initiated to the specified path using the selected method
从API响应中获取参数，比如：列表对象中取值 result[*].order_n: Obtain parameters from API responses, such as the value result [*]. order in a list object_ Num, the value in the object is object. x
请选择API从属的业务域: Please select the business domain that the API belongs to
精准明确的业务域描述同样有助于后续管理 ^_^: Accurate and clear business domain descriptions also help with subsequent management^_^
确定是否执行此操作?: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?
修改流程所属应用后新触发流程变更，旧数据所属应用仍然保持不变: After modifying the application to which the process belongs, a new process change is triggered, and the application to which the old data belongs remains unchanged
请输入角色名称搜索: Please enter a role name to search for
支持上传 .png, .jpeg, jpg, .ico 格式图片，建议 .png: Support uploading. png,. jpeg, jpg, and. ico format images. It is recommended to have a resolution of 512X512 for. png, and the image size should not exceed 1m.
请输入业务域名称: Please enter a business domain name
新增DB资源，可以是查询、插入、更新、删除等操作类资源，不允许执行DDL。: New DB resources can be query, insert, update, delete, and other operational resources, and DDL execution is not allowed.
确定删除吗?: Are you sure to delete it?
当接口调用成功时，指定的响应码。: The specified response code when the interface call is successful.
删除节点后，同时删除分支下所有节点，请确认执行此操作: After deleting the node, delete all nodes under the branch at the same time. Please confirm to perform this operation
参数名不允许重复: Duplicate parameter names are not allowed
精准明确的Api描述同样有助于后续管理: Accurate and clear Api descriptions are also helpful for subsequent management
条件分支不允许被点击: Conditional branches are not allowed to be clicked
选择请求开放接口时所使用的数据加密算法，密钥可在创建后查看: Select the data encryption algorithm used when requesting an open interface, and the key can be viewed after creation
参数名称规则：参数名称必须以字母开头，支持输入数字和下划线，不支持输入汉字: Parameter name rule: Parameter names must start with a letter, support inputting numbers and underscores, and do not support inputting Chinese characters
该节点未运行，暂无日志记录: This node is not running and currently has no logging
请确定要删除吗？: Are you sure you want to delete it?
请确保应用名称唯一，便于后续管理和使用。: Please ensure that the application name is unique for future management and use.
输入Function名称以搜索: Enter a Function name to search for
请选择您需要连接的资源: Please select the resource you need to connect to
站内信通知节点表单: Notification Node Form for In-Site Messages
确认停用当前应用吗？停用后，对应开发者将无法访问授权的资源: Are you sure to deactivate the current application? After deactivation, corresponding developers will not be able to access authorized resources
当前集成接口「${activeRecord.resourceName}」已被以下:
The current integrated API 「${activeRecord.resourceName}」 is referenced by the following open APIs:
Open API 「${activeRecord.openInterfaceName}」 (Path: ${activeRecord.openInterfacePath})
Deleting this integrated API will also delete the open APIs that reference it. After deletion, all open APIs depending on this API will fail to function properly, which may cause business interruptions.
为便于管理，文件名称在当前连接器内唯一，至多128个字符。: For easy management, file name must be unique within the current connector, up to 128 characters.
停用后日志内容不再全量记录，将会受到日志频率限制管控: After deactivation, logs will no longer be fully recorded and will be subject to frequency limits
删除接口前请确认依赖关系: Please confirm dependencies before deleting the interface.
可根据实际需要，设置您所需要的响应预处理函数: Set your required response preprocessing function according to actual needs
可根据实际需要，设置您所需要的请求预处理函数: Set your required request preprocessing function according to actual needs
启用时将忽略日志频率配置，完整记录接口日志的请求与响应内容: When enabled, log frequency configuration is ignored, and API request/response logs are fully recorded
将使用自定义的 Header 完成鉴权: Will use custom Header for authentication
工具名称只能是中文、字母、数字、下划线、中划线: Tool name can only contain Chinese, letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens
工具名称只能是字母、数字、下划线: Tool name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores
工具唯一识别凭证，MCP 内全局唯一，修改工具名称不影响集成/开放接口同步更新至: Tool unique ID, globally unique in MCP. Modifying tool name won't affect sync to MCP
您可以修改工具名称: You can modify the tool name
技术名称只能使用字母或数字且全局唯一，可由系统自动生成: Technical name can only use letters or numbers and must be globally unique. It can be automatically generated.
技术名称只能包含字母和数字，且必须以字母开头: Technical name can only contain letters and numbers, and must start with a letter.
支持的格式有xlsx、xls、csv，且小于50M: Supported formats: xlsx, xls, csv, less than 50M
根据请求头 X-Forwarded-For 判断是否在允许列表中: Check if in allowlist based on X-Forwarded-For header
精准明确的工具描述有助于大模型/智能体理解: A clear and precise tool description helps LLM/Agent understanding
精准明确的描述有助于后续管理^_^: A clear and precise description helps subsequent management ^_^
被IP白名单规则限制时的响应状态码，默认403: Response status code when restricted by IP whitelist, default 403
被IP白名单规则限制时的响应结果: Response result when restricted by IP whitelist
请慎重选择您的 MCP 服务鉴权方案，选择【无】代表完全公开所有 MCP 资源/: Carefully select MCP service auth scheme. [None] completely opens all MCP resources/tools/prompts.
请确保文件集名称唯一，便于后续管理和使用。: Please ensure file set name is unique for easy management and use.
请确认接口调用环境是否为可测试环境，否则可能带来不可挽回的后果: Please confirm if the API call environment is testable, otherwise it may cause irreversible consequences.
请输入IP 或 IP网段: Please enter IP or IP range
请输入当前 MCP 应用的描述: Please enter description for current MCP app
默认 Authorization，支持自定义 Header Key: Default Authorization, supports custom Header Key
精准明确的 API 描述同样有助于后续管理: Accurate and clear API description also helps with subsequent management
工具唯一识别凭证，MCP 内全局唯一，修改工具名称不影响集成 / 开放接口同步更: The unique identification credential of the tool is globally unique in MCP. Modifying the tool name does not affect the synchronous update of integrated/open APIs to MCP
精准明确的工具描述有助于大模型 / 智能体理解: Accurate and clear tool description helps large models/agents understand
请慎重选择您的 MCP 服务鉴权方案，选择【无】代表完全公开所有 MCP 资源: Please carefully select your MCP service authentication scheme. Selecting [None] means all MCP resources/tools/prompts are fully public
从 API 响应中获取参数，比如：列表对象中取值 result.order_nu: Get parameters from API response, e.g.: get value result.order_num from list object, object.x from object
消息触发里的设置参数弹窗: Settings Parameter Popup in Message Trigger
开启更新数据触发流程: Enable Trigger Process on Data Update
输入通知收件人邮箱，回车保存: Enter recipient's email, press Enter to save
输入通知接收人手机号，回车保存: Enter recipient phone number for notification, press Enter to save
短信将发送至员工所绑定的手机号，若该员工未绑定手机号，将从用户中心获取。: SMS will be sent to the phone number bound to the employee. If not bound, it will be obtained from User Center.
